title: CraftGR
description: A Touhou Project music player for Minecraft | Fan-made songs streamed from Gensokyo Radio
body:
CraftGR - A Touhou Project music player for Minecraft

CraftGR is a music player mod designed specifically for streaming Touhou Project fan-made arrangements from [Gensokyo Radio](https://gensokyoradio.net/). It features a customizable overlay with the song information and a sound visualizer. ℹ️ **Install [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) to access this mod's configuration menu.** # 🔎 Preview - The Song overlay HUD shows the name, release year, artist, album and the circle of the current song with a dynamic sound visualizer: ![HUD Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KabanFriends/creation/refs/heads/master/images/craftgr/song_1.png) ![HUD Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KabanFriends/creation/refs/heads/master/images/craftgr/song_2.png) - Music volume can be changed in Music & Sound Options menu: ![Volume Slider](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KabanFriends/creation/refs/heads/master/images/craftgr/slider.jpg) - Hotkey to mute/unmute the music: ![Toggle Mute Hotkey](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KabanFriends/creation/refs/heads/master/images/craftgr/hotkey.jpg) # ❓ Frequently Asked Questions ### Q. Can you backport this mod to older Minecraft versions? A. No. Only the newest Minecraft version is supported. ### Q. I found a bug! What do I do? A. If you are using the latest version of the mod, please make a bug report on the [Issues](https://github.com/KabanFriends/CraftGR/issues) page of this mod's GitHub repository. # 📚 Attributions - CraftGR is an open source project under [LGPL-3.0](https://github.com/KabanFriends/CraftGR/blob/master/LICENSE) license - Audio and song metadata are provided by [Gensokyo Radio](https://gensokyoradio.net/) - Gensokyo Radio is © LunarSpotlight Media - Touhou Project is © Team Shanghai Alice / ZUN - The owner (KabanFriends) and contributors of CraftGR are not affiliated with Mojang, Microsoft, or any of the teams behind Gensokyo Radio or Touhou Project.
